name: S1PC eNAMPT aged-mouse and human biomarker study
summary: Mixed translational study reporting S1PC activation of adipose LKB1/SIRT1/eNAMPT signaling, aged-mouse skeletal-muscle force and frailty-index effects, and circulating eNAMPT increases in human individuals with healthy adipose mass.
population: Human individuals with healthy adipose mass in the circulating eNAMPT component reported by the abstract
model_system: Aged mice used for skeletal-muscle force, frailty-index, adipose eNAMPT, and hypothalamic signaling assessments
